steps.title: Track the two institutions
steps.content: The text presents the Museum of Latin American Art and the National Hispanic Cultural Center. For each institution, it gives identifying information and describes the artistic or cultural areas it focuses on.

steps.title: Reject absent comparisons
steps.content: Choice A invents funding, which the text never discusses. Choice B claims a contrast in collection sizes, but only one collection size is given. Choice D invents a historical development that encouraged the founding of both institutions. The purpose is to present information about two institutions and their focus areas. The answer is C.
